nodes.context: Italian American Mafia crime family based in San Francisco, California, active from early 1930s to 2006.
New York-based Mafia family listed as an ally of the San Francisco crime family.
Chicago-based organized crime group listed as an ally of the San Francisco crime family.
Dallas-based Mafia family; boss Joseph Civello had ties with San Francisco boss James Lanza.
Detroit-based organized crime group listed as an ally of the San Francisco crime family.
New York-based Mafia family; James Lanza had ties via associate William 'Bones' Remmer.
Los Angeles-based Mafia family; underboss Samuel Sciortino was cousin to San Francisco underboss Gaspare Sciortino.
San Jose-based Mafia family; boss Joseph Cerrito had ties with San Francisco boss James Lanza.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Dallas crime family , Detroit Partnership , Genovese crime family , Los Angeles crime family , San Jose crime family
edges.context: The infobox lists the Bonanno crime family as an ally of the San Francisco crime family.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Dallas crime family , Detroit Partnership , Genovese crime family , Los Angeles crime family , San Jose crime family
edges.context: The infobox lists the Chicago Outfit as an ally of the San Francisco crime family.

edges.evidence_quote: Lanza also made solid ties with other bosses, including Joseph Civello of Dallas and Joseph Cerrito of San Jose.
edges.context: James Lanza made solid ties with Dallas crime family boss Joseph Civello.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family , Chicago Outfit , Dallas crime family , Detroit Partnership , Genovese crime family , Los Angeles crime family , San Jose crime family
edges.context: The infobox lists the Detroit Partnership as an ally of the San Francisco crime family.

edges.evidence_quote: Lanza was well connected in Las Vegas via his friend William 'Bones' Remmer, a Jewish associate with ties to the Genovese crime family of New York.
edges.context: James Lanza had connections to the Genovese crime family through an associate.

edges.evidence_quote: His longtime underboss, Gaspare 'Bill' Sciortino was the cousin to the underboss of the Los Angeles crime family Samuel Sciortino.
edges.context: The underboss of the San Francisco crime family was cousin to the underboss of the Los Angeles crime family, indicating a familial tie.

edges.evidence_quote: Lanza also made solid ties with other bosses, including Joseph Civello of Dallas and Joseph Cerrito of San Jose.
edges.context: James Lanza made solid ties with San Jose crime family boss Joseph Cerrito.
